Task:
Create CI workflow for rv8 at .github/workflows/ci.yml.

Project is /Users/undivisible/projects/rv8 on branch ci-workflow.

Requirements:
- Trigger: push to main, pull_request
- Rust build + test on ubuntu-latest
- Two feature sets: default (cargo test) and servo-render (cargo test --features servo-render)
- Use stable Rust toolchain
- Also run `cargo build --release` for both feature sets
- Keep it minimal — ~20 lines, no matrices, no caching, no extra jobs
- Name: "CI"

The repo root Cargo.toml has both features. servo-render requires a system GL library (libgl1-mesa-dri on Ubuntu).

Write the file and verify with `cargo check` after.
